name: KulakanPay
summarize: A payment feature for the Barangkulakan application to support user transactions.
tech: React Native, CSS, Axios, RESTful API, Figma
jobdesc: Translated UI/UX designs into responsive and user-friendly interfaces. Built reusable components to improve development efficiency and consistency. Integrated RESTful APIs for dynamic data processing and display. Implemented data visualization using Highcharts to enhance monitoring and insights.

name: P-MAP
summarize: This application is designed to monitor the quality and condition of pipeline network used in the distribution of crude oil.
jobdesc: Developed the mobile app based on user needs to support the end-to-end wholesale transaction process. Developed reusable components and implemented Figma designs into responsive and user friendly interface. Integrated REST APIs to support data display and management, including product listings, transactions, and user profiles.
